title: VO2max Ladder (Wattbike Style)
description: Progressive intensity across all aerobic zones
purpose: Progressive intensity across all aerobic zones

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Easy miles make fast racing. Stop thinking and start pedaling.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Steady state endurance. 70% FTP. Sustainable for hours.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This might feel too easy. That's the point. Patience builds power.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Endurance pace: where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay patient. Stay easy. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/9. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-100 rpm, 55% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Sweet spot? There's nothing sweet about this. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Threshold effort at 100% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay strong. This effort builds mental toughness as much as physical fitness.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've never actually done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep breath. Settle in. You can hold this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-100 rpm, 55% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your competition quit 2 reps ago. You're still here. That's the difference.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Target: 110% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Lock in and execute.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is THE rep that makes you faster. The one where most people quit.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 6/9. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 6. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 7/9. Your legs are screaming. Good. That means it's working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: You've accumulated 37min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 7 of 9 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 7: where dreams go to die, and watts go to live.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost there. Keep the power smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 8/9. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 8. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last set. Empty the tank. You can rest when you're dead. Or in 5 minutes.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final rep of this set. Empty the tank — you have 0s recovery coming.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep. Leave nothing in reserve. You can rest when you're done.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 9. Your legs are filing a formal complaint. Denied.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-100 rpm, 50% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.
